meta.name: Plugins demo — a homelab / dev host
meta.author: Manifest OS
meta.description: Shows the plugin system: the bundled `docker`, `tailscale`, `ollama` and `steam` blocks expand into packages + services the core engine never had to know about — plus one INLINE plugin (`syncthing`) carried in the manifest itself, so this file is fully self-contained and reproduces the same system anywhere, no plugin install needed.

plugins.description: Continuous file sync, run as a per-user service.
